# Gift of Foresight

> [!info] 💧 Attachment · Cost: **2** · Spirit

*Condition.*

---

Attach to a hero with at least 2 printed WP. Limit 1 per hero.
Attached hero gets +2 DEF if it has not committed to the quest this round.
